claims.claim_text: Senate Bill 1111 requires any trash receptacle larger than 3 feet to have reflective fluorescent taping to increase roadway visibility.
SB 1111 seeks to improve nighttime visibility enabling more reaction time, which will result in safer roads for drivers and cyclists at night.
Trash receptacles and storage containers can be virtually invisible on a dark night and can be a major public safety concern.
